name: SMS Alert
summary: Sends an SMS message using Twilio or Vonage when triggered by an incoming alert payload.
description:
# SMS Alert

Sends an SMS to the configured recipient using Twilio or Vonage. The message body is rendered from a Handlebars template that can reference any field in the incoming payload.

## Use cases
- Page on-call engineers with critical alert details
- Send order confirmation or shipping notifications
- Deliver OTP or verification codes

## Notes
- `authToken` and `accountSid` are stored securely and never exported
- The `messageTemplate` supports Handlebars syntax: `{{field}}`
- SMS messages are limited to 160 characters per segment; longer messages are split automatically
- For Vonage, `accountSid` holds the API key and `authToken` holds the API secret

inputs.name: AlertPayload
inputs.description: Alert or event payload. Fields are accessible in the messageTemplate via Handlebars syntax.

accountSid.title: Account SID / API Key
accountSid.description: Twilio Account SID or Vonage API Key.

authToken.title: Auth Token / API Secret
authToken.description: Twilio Auth Token or Vonage API Secret. Stored securely.

fromNumber.title: From Number
fromNumber.description: Sender phone number in E.164 format.

toNumber.title: To Number
toNumber.description: Recipient phone number in E.164 format.

messageTemplate.title: Message Template
messageTemplate.description: Handlebars template for the SMS body. Reference payload fields with {{fieldName}}.
